description: Trousseau list with many typical items, mentioning the bride Turfa bt. Hārūn; on verso is another document (this one in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli, fl. 1066–1108 CE) concerning Turfa and her husband Arye b. Yehuda (whose first wife was al-Wuḥsha), which also mentions Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen. Dating: ca. early 12th century. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
